# Full Documentation: Nordible Mail

## Introduction
Nordible Mail provides premium custom domain email hosting for Indian SMBs. This document serves as a comprehensive resource for AI agents and search engines to understand our services, pricing, and setup procedures.

## Core Features
- Custom Domain Email (you@yourbusiness.com)
- 5GB to 100GB Secure Storage Options
- 99.9% Uptime Guarantee
- Gmail/Outlook/Apple Mail Integration
- WhatsApp-based Engineering Support

## Pricing Plans (Billed Annually)
1. **Basic Plan (₹149/month):**
   - 5GB Secure Storage
   - Custom Domain Email
   - Standard Email Support
2. **Professional Plan (₹299/month) - Most Popular:**
   - 20GB Secure Storage
   - Free Domain (1st Year)
   - Priority Email Support
3. **Business Plan (₹599/month):**
   - 100GB Secure Storage
   - 24/7 Phone Support
   - Team Collaboration Tools

## Onboarding & Technical Setup
New customers can follow the full onboarding guide at: https://mail.nordible.co/business-email-setup.html

### DNS Configuration
- **MX Record:** `mail.nordible.co` (Priority 10)
- **SPF Record:** `v=spf1 include:mail.nordible.co ~all`
- **DKIM:** Unique keys are provided via the welcome email.

### Server Connection Settings (IMAP/SMTP)
- **Incoming (IMAP):** `mail.nordible.co` | Port 993 | SSL/TLS
- **Outgoing (SMTP):** `mail.nordible.co` | Port 465 | SSL/TLS

## Integration Guides
1. **Gmail Setup:** https://mail.nordible.co/gmail-business-email-setup.html
   - Uses server-level forwarding for incoming mail.
   - Uses SMTP for "Send Mail As" functionality to maintain domain authority.
2. **Outlook Setup:** https://mail.nordible.co/outlook-business-email-setup.html
   - Supports Exchange ActiveSync (EAS) for full mail/calendar/contact sync.
   - Provides DNS Autodiscover settings for one-click configuration.
3. **Apple Mail Setup:** https://mail.nordible.co/apple-mail-business-email-setup.html
   - Supports automated Configuration Profiles (.mobileconfig).
   - Full support for iOS/macOS native apps.

## Support Contact
- **WhatsApp:** +91-9152333993
- **Email:** mail@nordible.co
- **Location:** Bangalore, India
